query:
SELECT 
  id,
  leadId, 
  corretorId, 
  dataFollowUp,
  dataRegistro,
  status
FROM follow_ups
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT leadId 
  FROM follow_ups 
  WHERE status = 'pendente'
  GROUP BY leadId, corretorId, DATE(dataFollowUp)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  LIMIT 3
)
AND status = 'pendente'
ORDER BY leadId, dataFollowUp
LIMIT 20;
